tools.name: dataSets.createDataSet
tools.description: This operation creates a data set.

tools.name: dataSets.createRevision
tools.description: This operation creates a revision for a data set.

tools.name: dataSets.deleteAsset
tools.description: This operation deletes an asset.

tools.name: dataSets.deleteDataSet
tools.description: This operation deletes a data set.

tools.name: dataSets.deleteRevision
tools.description: This operation deletes a revision.

tools.name: dataSets.getAsset
tools.description: This operation returns information about an asset.

tools.name: dataSets.getDataSet
tools.description: This operation returns information about a data set.

tools.name: dataSets.getRevision
tools.description: This operation returns information about a revision.

tools.name: dataSets.listDataSetRevisions
tools.description: This operation lists a data set's revisions sorted by CreatedAt in descending order.

tools.name: dataSets.listDataSets
tools.description: This operation lists your data sets. When listing by origin OWNED, results are sorted by CreatedAt in descending order. When listing by origin ENTITLED, there is no order and the maxResults parameter is ignored.

tools.name: dataSets.listRevisionAssets
tools.description: This operation lists a revision's assets sorted alphabetically in descending order.

tools.name: dataSets.revokeRevision
tools.description: This operation revokes subscribers' access to a revision.

tools.name: dataSets.updateAsset
tools.description: This operation updates an asset.

tools.name: dataSets.updateDataSet
tools.description: This operation updates a data set.

tools.name: dataSets.updateRevision
tools.description: This operation updates a revision.

tools.name: eventActions.createEventAction
tools.description: This operation creates an event action.

tools.name: eventActions.deleteEventAction
tools.description: This operation deletes the event action.

tools.name: eventActions.getEventAction
tools.description: This operation retrieves information about an event action.

tools.name: eventActions.listEventActions
tools.description: This operation lists your event actions.

tools.name: eventActions.updateEventAction
tools.description: This operation updates the event action.

tools.name: jobs.cancelJob
tools.description: This operation cancels a job. Jobs can be cancelled only when they are in the WAITING state.

tools.name: jobs.createJob
tools.description: This operation creates a job.

tools.name: jobs.getJob
tools.description: This operation returns information about a job.

tools.name: jobs.listJobs
tools.description: This operation lists your jobs sorted by CreatedAt in descending order.

tools.name: jobs.startJob
tools.description: This operation starts a job.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: This operation lists the tags on the resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: This operation tags a resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: This operation removes one or more tags from a resource.

tools.name: v1XAmznDataexchangeAssetIdXAmznDataexchangeDataSetIdXAmznDataexchangeRevisionId.sendApiAsset
tools.description: This operation invokes an API Gateway API asset. The request is proxied to the provider’s API Gateway API.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
